name: number-input

generation_prompt:

Name: number-input
Description: number-input is a number input UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable input behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.

Interactions: 
Tags: input, number, parkui

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

import { createStyleContext } from 'styled-system/jsx'
import { numberInput } from 'styled-system/recipes'

const { withProvider, withContext } = createStyleContext(numberInput)

export type RootProps = ComponentProps<typeof Root>
export const Root = withProvider(NumberInput.Root, 'roo
